title: Players Sit
description: This plugin allows players to sit on anything
body:
Give your players the freedom to sit anywhere in your world with just a simple right-click! This plugin allows players to sit on a variety of blocks including slabs, stairs, beds, and many others — making roleplay, resting, or just chilling way more immersive and fun.

Key Features:

Sit on almost any block: Not just stairs or slabs! Customize which blocks players can sit on via an easy-to-edit config file.

Fully configurable: Add or remove blocks from the sitting list to perfectly fit your server’s style and needs.

Simple to use: Players just right-click the block they want to sit on — no commands or complicated actions required.

Lightweight & efficient: Minimal impact on server performance, designed to work smoothly on all modern Minecraft versions.

Enhances roleplay & social interaction: Create cozy hangouts, chill zones, or just add a touch of realism to your world.

Perfect for survival, roleplay, and creative servers alike, SitAnywhere brings a simple yet powerful feature that your players will love. Customize it to fit your vision and watch your community relax and enjoy!
